About This Story

In this powerful story, Fatima and Ahmed escape danger with their three sons, Hassan, Omar, and Yusuf. They travel for 18 months through 8 countries. They must save Hassan's life from a heart condition. This journey is dangerous but full of kindness. It shows the strength of family and the hope of rebuilding. An inspiring story about a family who escapes danger together and rebuilds their life together.

Imagine you are ten years old. Your mother receives an execution order. Your older brother has a heart condition and needs special doctors. Your family must leave everything behind and travel through eight countries. You must walk, hide, and survive for eighteen months. You must stay together, or you will all die. This is the story of Omar and his family—a story of escape, survival, and rebuilding together.

In the year 2000, speaking out for women's rights in some countries was dangerous. Families who challenged powerful leaders often had to flee for their lives. This story takes place during that time, when families had to make impossible choices to protect their children.
